mapper.sql: id, user_id, message_id, feed_type, biz_type, send_type, status, read_time, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_message (user_id, message_id, biz_type, feed_type, send_type, status, read_time, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{messageId}, #{bizType}, #{feedType}, #{sendType}, #{status.code}, #{readTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_message (user_id, message_id, feed_type, biz_type, send_type, status, read_time, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{messageId}, #{feedType}, '', 0, 1, #{readTime}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 1, read_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT um.message_id FROM user_message um JOIN message_feed_mapping mfm ON um.message_id = mfm.message_id AND mfm.feed_type = #{feedType} WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND um.status = 1 AND um.send_type = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_message um JOIN message_feed_mapping mfm ON um.message_id = mfm.message_id AND mfm.feed_type = #{feedType} WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND um.status = 1 AND um.send_type = 0

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_message um JOIN message_feed_mapping mfm ON um.message_id = mfm.message_id AND mfm.feed_type = #{feedType} WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND um.status = 0 AND um.send_type = 1
